name: Stir Fried Asparagus
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut asparagus into 1-inch pieces and steam lightly.
2. Mix 1/2 cup water and the dry bouillon; reserve.
3. Mix cornstarch and 1 tablespoon water; reserve.
4. Heat oil in a wok or 12-inch skillet over medium heat.
5. Add asparagus, mushrooms, salt, and pepper. Stir fry for about 1 minute.
6. Stir in the bouillion mixture and heat to boiling.
7. Stir in the cornstarch mixture. Cook until thickened, about 10 seconds.
8. Serve as a side dish or entree. (90 calories per serving)
